info.title: tdPSA API Documentation
info.description: API documentation for tdPSA Clients module

get.description: Returns list of assets with pagination. Can be filtered by client_id.

post.description: Creates an asset record. Manual Asset Settings provide defaults when optional type, ip_type, or status fields are omitted.

get.description: Returns detailed information for a specific asset
Returns list of clients with pagination

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search by client name, organization number, client number, or billing email.

post.description: Creates a client and a default site.

get.description: Returns list of assets belonging to a specific client

parameters.name: client
parameters.description: ID of client to return assets for

post.description: Creates a site for a client.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of contacts. Supports q, email, phone, and status filters.

post.description: Creates or updates a contact. Existing contacts are matched by email or normalized phone.

get.description: Returns one contact with communication methods and relations.

put.description: Updates a known contact by ID.

patch.description: Partially updates a known contact by ID.

get.description: Returns paginated unrouted inbox messages. Messages already linked to tickets are excluded.
Returns a paginated list of knowledge articles.

post.description: Creates a knowledge article and renders Markdown to HTML.

put.description: Updates a knowledge article and re-renders Markdown to HTML.

patch.description: Partially updates a knowledge article. Missing required edit fields are inherited from the current article.

post.summary: Mark all user notifications as read

get.description: Returns a paginated list of storage items. Use q, sku, ean_number, warehouse_id, box_id, and status to narrow results.

post.description: Creates a task. Optional owner_type supports client or ticket.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of tickets.

post.description: Creates a ticket through the ticket engine.

get.description: Returns one ticket by ticket key.

put.description: Updates ticket fields and optionally changes status.

patch.description: Partially updates ticket fields and optionally changes status.

tags.description: API endpoints for risk assessments, risk items, and risk item updates.

tags.name: Sales
tags.description: API endpoints for sales opportunities and sales activities.

tags.name: Storage
tags.description: API endpoints for storage inventory, warehouses, boxes, and stock adjustments.

tags.name: Taxonomy
tags.description: API endpoints for shared categories and tags.
